channel.title: kernel.org — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by kernel.org (linux).

item.title: CVE-2026-63836 — batman-adv: tp_meter: avoid divide-by-zero for dec_cwnd
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: batman-adv: tp_meter: avoid divide-by-zero for dec_cwnd The cwnd is always MSS <= cwnd <= 0x20000000. But the calculation in batadv_tp_update_cwnd() assumes unsigned 32 bit arithmeti…

item.title: CVE-2026-63835 — batman-adv: v: prevent OGM aggregation on disabled hardif
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: batman-adv: v: prevent OGM aggregation on disabled hardif When an interface gets disabled, the worker is correctly disabled by batadv_hardif_disable_interface() -> ... -> batadv_v_og…

item.title: CVE-2026-63834 — batman-adv: tp_meter: restrict number of unacked list entries
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: batman-adv: tp_meter: restrict number of unacked list entries When the unacked_list is unbound, an attacker could send messages with small lengths and appropriated seqno + gaps to fo…

item.title: CVE-2026-63833 — ntfs3: reject direct userspace writes to reserved $LX* xattrs
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: ntfs3: reject direct userspace writes to reserved $LX* xattrs NTFS3 uses $LXUID, $LXGID, $LXMOD and $LXDEV as internal WSL permission metadata and reloads them into i_uid, i_gid and…

item.title: CVE-2026-63832 — wifi: mt76: add wcid publish check in mt76_sta_add
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: wifi: mt76: add wcid publish check in mt76_sta_add Since mt7925_mac_sta_add publishes wcid, add publish check in mt76_sta_add to avoid reinitializing the wcid->poll_list. Found dev->…

item.title: CVE-2026-63831 — mac802154: llsec: add skb_cow_data() before in-place crypto
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: mac802154: llsec: add skb_cow_data() before in-place crypto llsec_do_encrypt_unauth(), llsec_do_encrypt_auth(), llsec_do_decrypt_unauth(), and llsec_do_decrypt_auth() all perform in-…

item.title: CVE-2026-63830 — net: skmsg: preserve sg.copy across SG transforms
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: net: skmsg: preserve sg.copy across SG transforms The sk_msg sg.copy bitmap is part of the scatterlist entry ownership state. A set bit tells sk_msg_compute_data_pointers() not to ex…

item.title: CVE-2026-63829 — net: ip_gre: require CAP_NET_ADMIN in the device netns for changelink
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: net: ip_gre: require CAP_NET_ADMIN in the device netns for changelink A tunnel changelink() operates on at most two netns, dev_net(dev) and the tunnel link netns t->net. They differ…

item.title: CVE-2026-63828 — apparmor: mediate the implicit connect of TCP fast open sendmsg
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: apparmor: mediate the implicit connect of TCP fast open sendmsg sendmsg()/sendto() with MSG_FASTOPEN is a combination of connect(2) and write(2): it opens the connection in the SYN.…

item.title: CVE-2026-63827 — apparmor: fix use-after-free in rawdata dedup loop
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: apparmor: fix use-after-free in rawdata dedup loop aa_replace_profiles() walks ns->rawdata_list to dedup the incoming policy blob against entries already attached to existing profile…

item.title: CVE-2026-63826 — fbdev: fix use-after-free in store_modes()
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: fbdev: fix use-after-free in store_modes() store_modes() replaces a framebuffer's modelist with modes from userspace. On success it frees the old modelist with fb_destroy_modelist().…

item.title: CVE-2026-63825 — gcov: use atomic counter updates to fix concurrent access crashes
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: gcov: use atomic counter updates to fix concurrent access crashes GCC's GCOV instrumentation can merge global branch counters with loop induction variables as an optimization. In inf…

item.title: CVE-2026-63824 — KEYS: fix overflow in keyctl_pkey_params_get_2()
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: KEYS: fix overflow in keyctl_pkey_params_get_2() The length for the internal output buffer is calculated incorrectly, which can result overflow when a too small buffer is provided. F…

item.title: CVE-2026-63823 — keys: Pin request_key_auth payload in instantiate paths
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: keys: Pin request_key_auth payload in instantiate paths A: request_key() B: KEYCTL_INSTANTIATE_IOV ================ ========================= create auth key store rka in auth key wa…

item.title: CVE-2026-63822 — wifi: ath11k: fix warning when unbinding
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: wifi: ath11k: fix warning when unbinding If there is an error during some initialization related to firmware, the buffers dp->tx_ring[i].tx_status are released. However this is relea…

item.title: CVE-2026-63821 — wifi: rtw88: usb: fix memory leaks on USB write failures
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: wifi: rtw88: usb: fix memory leaks on USB write failures When rtw_usb_write_port() fails to submit a USB Request Block (URB) (e.g., due to device disconnect or ENOMEM), the completio…

item.title: CVE-2026-63820 — f2fs: fix missing read bio submission on large folio error
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: f2fs: fix missing read bio submission on large folio error f2fs_read_data_large_folio() can keep a read bio across multiple readahead folios. If a later folio hits an error before an…

item.title: CVE-2026-63819 — f2fs: fix to do sanity check on f2fs_get_node_folio_ra()
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: f2fs: fix to do sanity check on f2fs_get_node_folio_ra() kernel BUG at fs/f2fs/file.c:845! Oops: invalid opcode: 0000 [#1] SMP KASAN NOPTI CPU: 0 UID: 0 PID: 5336 Comm: syz.0.0 Not t…

item.title: CVE-2026-63818 — f2fs: validate orphan inode entry count
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: f2fs: validate orphan inode entry count f2fs_recover_orphan_inodes() trusts the orphan block entry_count when replaying orphan inodes from the checkpoint pack. A corrupted entry_coun…

item.title: CVE-2026-63817 — f2fs: validate compress cache inode only when enabled
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: f2fs: validate compress cache inode only when enabled F2FS_COMPRESS_INO() uses NM_I(sbi)->max_nid as the synthetic inode number for the compressed page cache inode. That inode only e…

item.title: CVE-2026-63816 — f2fs: atomic: fix UAF issue on f2fs_inode_info.atomic_inode
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: f2fs: atomic: fix UAF issue on f2fs_inode_info.atomic_inode - ioctl(F2FS_IOC_GARBAGE_COLLECT_RANGE) - shrink - f2fs_gc - gc_data_segment - ra_data_block(cow_inode) - mapping = F2FS_I…

item.title: CVE-2026-63815 — f2fs: bound i_inline_xattr_size for non-inline-xattr inodes
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: f2fs: bound i_inline_xattr_size for non-inline-xattr inodes When the flexible_inline_xattr feature is enabled, do_read_inode() loads the on-disk i_inline_xattr_size unconditionally:…

item.title: CVE-2026-63814 — f2fs: validate ACL entry sizes in f2fs_acl_from_disk()
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: f2fs: validate ACL entry sizes in f2fs_acl_from_disk() f2fs_acl_count() only validates the aggregate ACL xattr length. A malformed ACL can still place ACL_USER or ACL_GROUP in a slot…

item.title: CVE-2026-63813 — Revert "f2fs: remove non-uptodate folio from the page cache in move_data_block"
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: Revert "f2fs: remove non-uptodate folio from the page cache in move_data_block" This reverts commit 9609dd704725a40cd63d915f2ab6c44248a44598. The kernel panics are keeping to be repo…

item.title: CVE-2026-63812 — f2fs: fix incorrect FI_NO_EXTENT handling in __destroy_extent_node()
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: f2fs: fix incorrect FI_NO_EXTENT handling in __destroy_extent_node() When __destroy_extent_node() sets the inode flag FI_NO_EXTENT, it does not reset the length of the largest extent…

item.title: CVE-2026-63811 — f2fs: read COW data with the original inode during atomic write
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: f2fs: read COW data with the original inode during atomic write When updating an atomic-write file, f2fs_write_begin() may read the previously written data back from the COW inode: p…

item.title: CVE-2026-63810 — block: Avoid mounting the bdev pseudo-filesystem in userspace
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: block: Avoid mounting the bdev pseudo-filesystem in userspace The bdev pseudo-filesystem is an internal kernel filesystem with which userspace should not interfere. Unregister it so…

item.title: CVE-2026-63809 — bpf: use kvfree() for replaced sysctl write buffer
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: bpf: use kvfree() for replaced sysctl write buffer proc_sys_call_handler() allocates its temporary sysctl buffer with kvzalloc() and passes it to __cgroup_bpf_run_filter_sysctl(). Si…

item.title: CVE-2026-63808 — exfat: fix potential use-after-free in exfat_find_dir_entry()
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: exfat: fix potential use-after-free in exfat_find_dir_entry() In exfat_find_dir_entry(), the buffer_head obtained from exfat_get_dentry() is released with brelse(bh) before the fall-…

item.title: CVE-2026-63807 — KVM: x86/mmu: Ensure hugepage is in by slot before checking max mapping level
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: KVM: x86/mmu: Ensure hugepage is in by slot before checking max mapping level When recovering hugepages in the shadow MMU, verify that the base gfn of the shadow page is actually con…

item.title: CVE-2026-63806 — KVM: Replace guest-triggerable BUG_ON() in ioeventfd datamatch with get_unaligned()
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: KVM: Replace guest-triggerable BUG_ON() in ioeventfd datamatch with get_unaligned() Drop a BUG_ON() that has been reachable since it was first added, way back in 2009, and instead us…

item.title: CVE-2026-63805 — crypto: nx - fix nx_crypto_ctx_exit argument
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: crypto: nx - fix nx_crypto_ctx_exit argument nx_crypto_ctx_shash_exit calls nx_crypto_ctx_exit with crypto_shash_ctx(...) but crypto_shash_ctx gives a nx_crypto_ctx *, not a crypto_t…

item.title: CVE-2026-63804 — gfs2: fix use-after-free in gfs2_qd_dealloc
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: gfs2: fix use-after-free in gfs2_qd_dealloc gfs2_qd_dealloc(), called as an RCU callback from gfs2_qd_dispose(), accesses the superblock object sdp through qd->qd_sbd after freeing q…

item.title: CVE-2026-63803 — hdlc_ppp: sync per-proto timers before freeing hdlc state
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: hdlc_ppp: sync per-proto timers before freeing hdlc state Each PPP control protocol (LCP/IPCP/IPV6CP) embedded in struct ppp registers a timer via timer_setup(). That struct ppp is t…

item.title: CVE-2026-63802 — blk-cgroup: fix UAF in __blkcg_rstat_flush()
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: blk-cgroup: fix UAF in __blkcg_rstat_flush() When multiple blkgs in the same blkcg are released concurrently, a use-after-free can occur. The race happens when one blkg's __blkcg_rst…

item.title: CVE-2026-63801 — tipc: fix slab-use-after-free Read in tipc_aead_decrypt_done
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: tipc: fix slab-use-after-free Read in tipc_aead_decrypt_done tipc_aead_decrypt() goes straight from tipc_bearer_hold(b) to crypto_aead_decrypt(req) without taking a reference on the…

item.title: CVE-2026-63800 — pNFS: Fix use-after-free in pnfs_update_layout()
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: pNFS: Fix use-after-free in pnfs_update_layout() When hitting the NFS_LAYOUT_RETURN branch in pnfs_update_layout(), the code calls pnfs_prepare_to_retry_layoutget(lo). If it succeeds…

item.title: CVE-2026-63799 — sched/mmcid: Fix OOB clear_bit when CID is MM_CID_UNSET in fixup path
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: sched/mmcid: Fix OOB clear_bit when CID is MM_CID_UNSET in fixup path In mm_cid_fixup_cpus_to_tasks(), when rq->curr has the target mm and mm_cid.active is set, the CID is checked wi…

item.title: CVE-2026-63798 — irqchip/imgpdc: Fix resource leak, add missing chained handler cleanup on remove
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: irqchip/imgpdc: Fix resource leak, add missing chained handler cleanup on remove The driver allocates domain generic chips using irq_alloc_domain_generic_chips() during probe and set…

item.title: CVE-2026-63797 — rpmsg: char: Fix use-after-free on probe error path
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: rpmsg: char: Fix use-after-free on probe error path rpmsg_chrdev_probe() stores the newly allocated eptdev in the default endpoint's priv pointer before calling rpmsg_chrdev_eptdev_a…

item.title: CVE-2026-63796 — ocfs2: reject oversized group bitmap descriptors
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: ocfs2: reject oversized group bitmap descriptors ocfs2_validate_gd_parent() only bounds bg_bits against the parent allocator's chain geometry. A malicious descriptor can still claim…

item.title: CVE-2026-63795 — 9p: avoid putting oldfid in p9_client_walk() error path
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: 9p: avoid putting oldfid in p9_client_walk() error path When p9_client_walk() is called with clone set to false, fid aliases oldfid. If the walk subsequently fails after the request…

item.title: CVE-2026-63794 — KVM: SVM: Fix page overflow in sev_dbg_crypt() for ENCRYPT path
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: KVM: SVM: Fix page overflow in sev_dbg_crypt() for ENCRYPT path In sev_dbg_crypt(), the per-iteration transfer length is bounded by the source page offset (PAGE_SIZE - s_off) but not…

item.title: CVE-2026-63793 — ntfs: serialize volume label accesses
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: ntfs: serialize volume label accesses Protect vol->volume_label with a mutex and snaphost the label before copy_to_user. This prevent a use-after-free when FS_IOC_SETFSLABEL replaces…

item.title: CVE-2026-53403 — fbdev: Fix fb_new_modelist to prevent null-ptr-deref in fb_videomode_to_var
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: fbdev: Fix fb_new_modelist to prevent null-ptr-deref in fb_videomode_to_var info->var, a framebuffer's current mode, is expected to have a matching entry in info->modelist. var_to_di…

item.title: CVE-2026-53402 — fbdev: fbcon: fix out-of-bounds read in err_out of fbcon_do_set_font()
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: fbdev: fbcon: fix out-of-bounds read in err_out of fbcon_do_set_font() When fbcon_do_set_font() fails (e.g., due to a memory allocation failure inside vc_resize() under heavy memory…

item.title: CVE-2026-53401 — fbdev: omap2: fix use-after-free in omapfb_mmap
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: fbdev: omap2: fix use-after-free in omapfb_mmap omapfb_mmap() has a race condition with OMAPFB_SETUP_PLANE ioctl that can lead to use-after-free: The fb_mmap() entry point holds mm_l…

item.title: CVE-2026-53400 — i2c: core: fix adapter registration race
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: i2c: core: fix adapter registration race Adapters can be looked up based on their id using i2c_get_adapter() which takes a reference to the embedded struct device. Make sure that the…

item.title: CVE-2026-53399 — nfsd: release layout stid on setlease failure
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: nfsd: release layout stid on setlease failure nfs4_alloc_stid() publishes the new stid into cl->cl_stateids via idr_alloc_cyclic() under cl_lock before returning to nfsd4_alloc_layou…

item.title: CVE-2026-53398 — NFSD: Fix SECINFO_NO_NAME decode error cleanup
item.description: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: NFSD: Fix SECINFO_NO_NAME decode error cleanup nfsd4_decode_secinfo_no_name() currently initializes sin_exp after decoding sin_style. If the XDR stream is truncated, the decoder retu…
